Who I Am

Design Is
Problem Solving

I'm a UI/UX Designer with an architectural background from NIT Patna and currently pursuing a Master's in Interaction Design & Innovation at Mahindra University. I bridge the gap between aesthetics and deep usability.

My work spans health tech, fintech, real estate, e-commerce, and government-sector redesigns. I bring structured, systems-level thinking to every screen I design.

01
Underwater Drone — Controller Interface
Mobile App · AUV Interface
Mobile App · AUV Interface

Underwater Drone
Controller Interface

Enhancing Exploration, Data Collection and User Experience Below the Surface

Operating underwater drones is highly complex, causing environmental limitations, stability issues and confused user experiences. This project delivers an intelligent multi-modal controller for AUVs, enabling all skill levels to safely operate and monitor drones in real time.

Mobile AppFigmaAdobe XDComplex UX
View on Behance ↗
MISSION BRIEF

Operating underwater drones is highly complex, causing environmental limitations, stability issues and confused user experiences. This project delivers an intelligent multi-modal controller for AUVs, enabling all skill levels to safely operate and monitor drones in real time.

Design Process
How We Got Here
🔬
1
UX Research
🗺️
2
User Flow
✏️
3
Wireframe
🎨
4
UI Design
📱
5
Prototype
Problem Statement
PROBLEM STATEMENT
  • Operating underwater drones is highly complex, causing environmental limitations
  • Stability issues with controller experience
  • Poor user feedback and confusion during operation
Research & Objectives
OBJECTIVE
Reduce learning time for new drone operators
Improve real-time data visibility
Increase mission safety and efficiency
RESEARCH INSIGHTS
Operators rely on technical manual for training
No industry-wide mobile AUV standard
Live battery/system data is critical for safety
Users & Pain Points
TARGET USERS
Marine Researchers
Underwater Drone Enthusiasts
Defence & Surveillance Teams
Aquaculture Engineers
PAIN POINTS
Poor orientation feedback
Complex and confusing UI
No consistent safety alerts
High cognitive load during operation
Solution Approach
What Was Designed
🎮
Dual Control Mode
Casual & Technical modes for all skill levels
📡
Real-Time Telemetry
Live sonar, camera feed and sensor data
🔴
Safety Alert System
Emergency stop and obstacle detection
🚀
Guided Onboarding
Splash screen with skill-level selection
💳
Subscription Access
Unlock advanced Technical Mode features
Key Features
📱
Onboarding Flow
Splash screen, login and skill-level profile creation
🎮
Dual Control Modes
Casual pre-set environments; Technical precision navigation
📡
Live Telemetry
Sonar visualisation, camera feed, sensor readings
🔒
Safety Systems
Emergency stop, obstacle alerts, low-visibility protocols
💳
Subscription Model
Freemium unlocking advanced Technical Mode

HOA House — Booking App
Mobile + Desktop · Booking
Mobile + Desktop · Booking

HOA House
Booking App

Simplifying Community Living, Booking & Management Experience

Unique booking systems face common challenges — complicated processes for amenities, poor communication between residents and management, and lack of real-time visibility. This platform solves it all in one seamless flow.

Mobile AppDesktopFigmaBooking Flow
View on Behance ↗
MISSION BRIEF

Unique booking systems face common challenges — complicated processes for amenities, poor communication between residents and management, and lack of real-time visibility. This platform solves it all in one seamless flow.

Design Process
How We Got Here
🔬
1
UX Research
🗺️
2
User Flow
✏️
3
Wireframe
🎨
4
UI Design
📱
5
Prototype
Problem Statement
PROBLEM STATEMENT
  • Complicated booking process for amenities
  • Poor communication between residents and HOA
  • No real-time booking visibility or transparency
Research & Objectives
OBJECTIVE
Design a clean booking platform
Improve communication workflows
Provide real-time availability and tracking
RESEARCH INSIGHTS
Users want simplified online booking steps
Real-time slot visibility is a top need
Residents need event notifications built-in
Users & Pain Points
TARGET USERS
Gated Community Residents
HOA Administrators
Amenity Managers
Maintenance Coordinators
PAIN POINTS
Property booking conflicts
Missed communications
Lack of real-time tracking
Time-consuming admin work
Solution Approach
What Was Designed
📅
Live Availability Calendar
Color-coded real-time slot calendar
✅
Smart Booking Flow
Step-by-step guided booking in 60 seconds
🔔
Notification System
Push alerts for confirmations and updates
🕒
History Dashboard
Track all bookings with one-tap re-book
💬
Community Connect
Direct messaging between residents and HOA
Key Features
📅
Live Availability
Color-coded interactive calendar with real-time slots
✅
Smart Booking Flow
Select, review, confirm in under 60 seconds
🔔
Notification System
Push alerts for confirmations and cancellations
🕒
History Dashboard
Track past and upcoming bookings with re-book
💬
Community Connect
Direct messaging between residents and HOA admins

FreshMart — Grocery App

A full-featured grocery app designed for busy individuals and families, offering smart search, personalised recommendations, quick checkout and flexible delivery scheduling.

Mobile AppFigmaE-Commerce
View on Behance ↗
MISSION BRIEF

A full-featured grocery app designed for busy individuals and families, offering smart search, personalised recommendations, quick checkout and flexible delivery scheduling.

Design Process
How We Got Here
🔬
1
UX Research
🗂️
2
Affinity Map
🗺️
3
User Flow
✏️
4
Wireframe
🎨
5
UI Design
Problem Statement
PROBLEM STATEMENT
  • Cluttered product discovery with no smart filtering
  • Long checkout flows causing cart abandonment
  • No personalised homepage based on history
Research & Objectives
OBJECTIVE
Create a seamless grocery shopping experience
Reduce checkout friction significantly
Deliver a personalised home feed
RESEARCH INSIGHTS
Users want brand, price and delivery-slot filters
Homepage personalisation drives repeat visits
Saved addresses reduce checkout time by 60%
Users & Pain Points
TARGET USERS
Busy Professionals
Young Families
Senior Citizens
Health-Conscious Shoppers
PAIN POINTS
Too many product choices without guidance
Long checkout process
No delivery time flexibility
Poor product search accuracy
Solution Approach
What Was Designed
🔍
Smart Search & Filters
Auto-suggestions with brand, price, slot filters
🏠
Personalised Homepage
Curated from preferences and purchase history
⚡
Quick Checkout
Saved addresses and one-tap time selection
🚚
Order Tracking
Real-time delivery progress with live map
🎁
Loyalty Rewards
Points system driving repeat engagement
Key Features
🔍
Smart Search
Auto-suggestions with brand, price and delivery-slot filters
🏠
Personalised Home
Homepage curated from preferences and purchase history
⚡
Quick Checkout
Saved addresses, multiple payments, one-tap scheduling
🚚
Order Tracking
Real-time delivery progress with live map and notifications
🎁
Loyalty Rewards
Points system driving repeat engagement and offers

Super Agers — Health App
Mobile App · Health & Wellness
Mobile App · Health & Wellness

Super Agers
Health App

Health App for Senior Citizens — Designed for 60+

A companion app for physically active adults 60+ to maintain healthy routines, track wellness, and stay socially connected with caregivers — with gentle, accessible design throughout.

Mobile AppAccessibilityHealth TechFigma
View on Behance ↗
MISSION BRIEF

A companion app for physically active adults 60+ to maintain healthy routines, track wellness, and stay socially connected with caregivers — with gentle, accessible design throughout.

Design Process
How We Got Here
🔬
1
UX Research
👤
2
User Persona
🗺️
3
User Flow
✏️
4
Wireframe
🎨
5
UI Design
Problem Statement
PROBLEM STATEMENT
  • Complex UIs excluding non-tech-savvy seniors
  • No unified wellness routine tracker for 60+
  • Poor caregiver visibility into user health
Research & Objectives
OBJECTIVE
Design an accessible, large-type interface
Unify medication, diet and exercise tracking
Enable caregiver health report sharing
RESEARCH INSIGHTS
Seniors prefer large text and minimal steps
Daily reminders significantly improve adherence
Caregiver loop reduces health incidents by 40%
Users & Pain Points
TARGET USERS
Active Adults 60+
Caregivers & Family
Health Coaches
Senior Care Facilities
PAIN POINTS
Complex navigation for non-tech users
Forgetting medication and hydration
Isolation from social check-ins
No easy health summary for doctors
Solution Approach
What Was Designed
💊
Daily Routine Dashboard
Medication, hydration, meal and movement in one place
🔔
Gentle Reminders
Non-intrusive alerts with sound and vibration
📔
Mood & Memory Log
Simple journaling for emotional and cognitive health
📊
Health Reports
Easy-to-read weekly summaries for caregivers
👥
Social Circle
Share milestones and check in on friends
Key Features
💊
Daily Dashboard
Medication, hydration, meal and movement reminders
🔔
Gentle Reminders
Non-intrusive alerts with sound and vibration options
📔
Mood & Memory
Simple journaling for emotional wellbeing
📊
Health Reports
Weekly summaries easy to share with caregivers
👥
Social Circle
Share milestones and check in on friends

Employee — Engagement Portal

Employee
Engagement Portal

Foster Exceptional Employee Engagements

An internal engagement platform fostering positive work culture through peer recognition, pulse surveys, event management and personalised analytics — built to scale across organisations.

DashboardEnterpriseFigma
View on Behance ↗
MISSION BRIEF

An internal engagement platform fostering positive work culture through peer recognition, pulse surveys, event management and personalised analytics — built to scale across organisations.

Design Process
How We Got Here
🔬
1
UX Research
🗂️
2
Affinity Map
🗺️
3
User Flow
✏️
4
Wireframe
🎨
5
UI Design
Problem Statement
PROBLEM STATEMENT
  • Scattered recognition making employees feel undervalued
  • No centralised feedback collection or analysis
  • Event participation is low due to poor visibility
Research & Objectives
OBJECTIVE
Create a single hub for engagement activities
Enable anonymous, actionable pulse surveys
Drive event participation through smart reminders
RESEARCH INSIGHTS
Peer recognition increases retention by 35%
Anonymous surveys get 3× more honest responses
Gamification boosts platform daily active users
Users & Pain Points
TARGET USERS
HR Managers
Team Leads
All Employees
C-Suite Executives
PAIN POINTS
Recognition scattered across email and chat
Survey fatigue from irrelevant questions
Low event awareness and participation
No personal engagement metric visibility
Solution Approach
What Was Designed
🏆
Recognition Wall
Public shoutouts, digital badges and peer feed
📋
Pulse Surveys
Anonymous feedback with visual analytics
🗓
Event Hub
Calendar for events, registration and reminders
📈
Personal Dashboard
User-specific metrics, achievements and scores
🤝
HR Integrations
Connects with HRMS tools for seamless data sync
Key Features
🏆
Recognition Wall
Public shoutouts, badges and peer appreciation feed
📋
Pulse Surveys
Anonymous feedback with visual analytics and trends
🗓
Event Hub
Calendar for internal events, registration and reminders
📈
Personal Dashboard
User-specific metrics, achievements and engagement scores
🤝
HR Integrations
Connects with HRMS tools for seamless data sync

ATM Interface — Redesign
UX Redesign · Fintech
UX Redesign · Fintech

ATM Interface
Redesign

All-in-1 ATM — Improving Human-Machine Experience

Frustrated by confusing ATM interfaces, this project redesigns the experience for elderly users, people with low digital literacy, and differently-abled individuals — creating a safer, more accessible system.

RedesignAccessibilityFigma
View on Behance ↗
MISSION BRIEF

Frustrated by confusing ATM interfaces, this project redesigns the experience for elderly users, people with low digital literacy, and differently-abled individuals — creating a safer, more accessible system.

Design Process
How We Got Here
🔬
1
Research
🗂️
2
Affinity Map
💡
3
Ideas & Solutions
🗺️
4
User Flow
✏️
5
Wireframe
Problem Statement
PROBLEM STATEMENT
  • Confusing menu structures causing transaction failures
  • No accessibility features for elderly or disabled users
  • Long transaction times reducing throughput
Research & Objectives
OBJECTIVE
Create a user-friendly ATM experience for all
Improve accessibility with voice and contrast modes
Reduce average transaction time significantly
RESEARCH INSIGHTS
67% of ATM errors are menu-navigation related
Large touch targets reduce error rate by 45%
Multilingual support needed for India's diversity
Users & Pain Points
TARGET USERS
Elderly Users
People with Low Digital Literacy
Differently-Abled Individuals
General Public
PAIN POINTS
Confusing menu hierarchy
No accessibility support
Long transaction times
No multilingual option
Solution Approach
What Was Designed
🖱
Icon-Based Menu
Large touch targets with simplified icon navigation
⚡
Quick Actions
Personalised shortcuts from past usage patterns
🌐
Multilingual Support
Seamless language switching at any point in flow
♿
Accessibility Mode
Voice guidance, high-contrast and screen reader
🔒
Security First
Masked PIN, timeout animations, privacy overlay
Key Features
🖱
Icon-Based Menu
Large touch targets with simplified icon-driven navigation
⚡
Quick Actions
Personalised shortcuts based on past behaviour
🌐
Multilingual
Seamless language switching at any flow point
♿
Accessibility
Voice guidance, high-contrast and screen reader support
🔒
Security First
Masked PIN, timeout animations and privacy overlay

Study Abroad — Landing Page
Landing Page · Education
Landing Page · Education

Study Abroad
Landing Page

We Help to Build Your Dream — FBT Study Abroad

A conversion-focused landing page helping students explore higher education overseas with curated universities, country highlights, testimonials and expert guidance — designed to inspire and convert.

Landing PageEducationFigma
View on Behance ↗
MISSION BRIEF

A conversion-focused landing page helping students explore higher education overseas with curated universities, country highlights, testimonials and expert guidance — designed to inspire and convert.

Design Process
How We Got Here
🔬
1
Research
🎯
2
Strategy
✏️
3
Wireframe
🎨
4
UI Design
🖥
5
Prototype
Problem Statement
PROBLEM STATEMENT
  • Students overwhelmed by unstructured international study info
  • Low conversion due to unclear CTAs and weak social proof
  • No step-by-step guidance reducing drop-off rates
Research & Objectives
OBJECTIVE
Design a high-converting education landing page
Build trust through testimonials and university logos
Guide users from discovery to application clearly
RESEARCH INSIGHTS
Above-the-fold CTAs increase conversion by 40%
University logos as trust signals reduce bounce rate
Step-by-step infographics reduce drop-off by 55%
Users & Pain Points
TARGET USERS
Aspiring International Students
Parents of Prospective Students
Education Counsellors
University Partners
PAIN POINTS
Information overload about countries and courses
Unclear application process
Lack of trust and social proof
No immediate counselling access
Solution Approach
What Was Designed
🎯
Hero CTA
Above-the-fold smart CTA for maximum conversion
🌍
Country Highlights
Scrollable destination cards with uni listings
⭐
Testimonials
Visual social proof from study-abroad alumni
📋
Process Infographic
Clear application flow reducing drop-off by 55%
💬
Chat Widget
Instant student counselling support integration
Key Features
🎯
Hero CTA
Above-the-fold smart CTA designed for maximum conversion
🌍
Country Highlights
Scrollable destination cards with course and uni listings
⭐
Testimonials

📋
Process Infographic
Clear application flow reducing drop-off significantly
💬

Dental Care — Mobile App
Mobile App · Healthcare
Mobile App · Healthcare

Dental Care
Mobile App

Reimagining Dental Care with a Seamless, Patient-Centric Digital Experience

A mobile application designed to simplify dental care by enabling users to book appointments, manage treatments, track oral health, and receive personalised dental guidance — improving patient experience, clinic efficiency, and preventive care awareness.

Mobile AppHealthcareUX DesignFigma
View on Behance ↗
MISSION BRIEF

A mobile application designed to simplify dental care by enabling users to book appointments, manage treatments, track oral health, and receive personalised dental guidance. The app focuses on improving patient experience, clinic efficiency, and preventive care awareness.

Design Process
How We Got Here
🔍
1
UX Research
🗺️
2
User Flow
✏️
3
Wireframe
🎨
4
UI Design
📱
5
Prototype
Problem Statement
PATIENTS FACE
  • Difficulty in booking and managing appointments
  • Lack of awareness about oral hygiene routines
  • No centralised record of dental history
  • Anxiety due to unclear treatment processes
  • Poor communication between clinic and patients
CLINICS ALSO STRUGGLE WITH
  • Patient no-shows
  • Manual record keeping
  • Inefficient scheduling
Research & Objectives
OBJECTIVE
To design a new app
Simplifies the booking process
Provides real-time slot loading
Ensures transparent pricing
Enhances overall user experience
RESEARCH INSIGHTS
From contextual inquiry and domain understanding
Users forget appointments — need reminders
Fear increases when treatment info is unclear
People prefer quick booking with minimal steps
Trust increases with doctor profiles and reviews
Visual explanation reduces anxiety
Users & Pain Points
TARGET USERS
Adults (18–60) visiting dental clinics
Patients undergoing ongoing treatments (braces, root canal)
Elderly patients needing assistance
Parents managing children's dental care
PAIN POINTS
Long waiting times
No clarity on treatment cost and process
Paper-based dental records
Lack of follow-up care
Poor user experience in existing apps
Solution Approach
What Was Designed
📅
Appointment Booking
Enables seamless appointment scheduling
🔍
Search Clinic / Doctor
Find nearby clinics and specialist doctors
🦷
Tracks Dental Health
Tracks dental health history digitally
💊
Sends Reminders
Sends reminders and follow-up care tips
📋
Treatment Transparency
Provides treatment transparency and cost
User Flow
Step-by-Step Journey
🔐
Login
🔍
Search
Clinic
📅
Books
Appointment
✅
Confirmation
& Reminder
🏥
Visits
Clinic
🦷
Treatment
Tracked
💊
Follow-up
& Care Tips
Key Features
📅
Easy Appointment Booking
Book appointments quickly with real-time doctor availability
📍
Nearby Clinics & Doctors
Discover clinics based on location and preferences
⏰
Real-Time Slot Availability
View and select available time slots instantly
📊
Digital Health Records
View prescriptions, reports, and treatment history
🔔
Smart Notifications
Appointment reminders, medication alerts and follow-up tips
Expected Impact
Outcomes
📉
Reduced Patient Anxiety
Clear treatment visuals and transparent cost breakdown
📈
Improved Appointment Efficiency
Automated booking, smart reminders and slot management
🦷
Better Oral Health Awareness
In-app education, hygiene tips and preventive care guides
🤝
Stronger Patient–Clinic Relationship
Seamless communication, follow-up care and feedback loop
